description: Retail brokerage tools a site maps bindings to.

reachable.description: Report whether the site is reachable.
True if the site loaded and looks operable.

detail.description: Optional note about the site's state.

outputSchema.description: The accounts the signed-in user can see.

errors.message: No active session; call auth.login first, then retry.
A two-factor challenge is pending; have the user complete it (see auth.mfaStatus), then retry.
The accounts page didn't load in time; retry, or call reachable to check the site is up.

account.description: The account to fetch (id or nickname).

errors.message: That account id wasn't found; call listAccounts and retry with a listed id.

previewOrder.description: Dry-run an equity order; returns a previewId and cost estimate.

account.description: The account to trade in (id or nickname).

price.description: Limit or stop price; omit for market orders.

previewId.description: Token for the previewed order; pass it to placeOrder to commit.

price.description: Limit or stop price, if any.

timeInForce.description: How long the order will stay active.

warnings.description: Warnings the broker raised on the preview.

expiresAt.description: When the preview expires and must be re-run.

confirm.description: Set true to confirm intent to place the order.

errors.message: No active session; call auth.login first, then retry.
A two-factor challenge is pending; have the user complete it (see auth.mfaStatus), then retry.
Write actions are disabled in the host; ask the user to enable them, then retry placing the order.
